integration_validation_v2.gap: The operator-review pause invariant (apply_proposal must not run while ticket Pending/Rejected) is real and well-asserted, but the whole e2e runs against a mock gate and an in-memory EditableSurfaceProvider; no real PromotionGate/PG is exercised, so the 'managed resource' claim is unproven.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: tests/promotion_gate_pause_e2e_tests.rs:292-308 mock promote writes to a RefCell value; 454 + 723 assert apply_count==0 invariant; sample_request/eval_result fixtures lines 315-369 are synthetic; grep confirms zero PgPool/sqlx/AtelierStore in the file; PromotionGateSubmitter still has no production impl (see MT-154).

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Production PostgresPromotionGate (promotion_gate_postgres.rs) with durable ticket/decision ledger rows and double-decision guard. Proof tests/atelier_promotion_pause_postgres_tests.rs: pending review persisted in PostgreSQL blocks promotion across 3 FRESH gate instances (promote_count==0, live value unchanged, PROMOTION_REQUESTED ledger); persisted rejection keeps promotion blocked across instances (rationale round-trips, PROMOTION_REJECTED); persisted approval unblocks exactly one promotion (exactly-one authority write, PROMOTION_ACCEPTED). Pause invariant production-shaped via LoopPromotionGate::require_approved before promote; apply_proposal proven non-mutating.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-170 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Parallel Model Coordination View -- Make parallel model actions observable/attributable/recoverable/conflict-aware via coordination projection.
proof_targets: cargo test --test atelier_promotion_pause_postgres_tests (managed PostgreSQL + EventLedger; persisted operator-review pause blocks progression)
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Parallel Model Coordination View
scope.summary: MT-170 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Parallel Model Coordination View -- Make parallel model actions observable/attributable/recoverable/conflict-aware via coordination projection.
